problem id: f20bf656
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00000001
  00110000 -> 00000000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01110111 -> 11100000
  11101111 -> 11100001
  10001110 -> 11000001
  00101010 -> 01000000
  01100100 -> 10000000

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 10100000
